about.title: Transforming Complex Business Processes
about.titleSuffix: Into Scalable Systems and Autonomous Workflows.
about.subtitle: At the intersection of technology and innovation
about.description: We build high-performance digital systems to reduce your manual workload and increase operational efficiency. With a robust tech stack (Next.js, Node.js) and AI integrations, we transform your business into an error-free and scalable structure.

whoWeAre.title: Building Tomorrow's Digital Infrastructure with Engineering Discipline.
whoWeAre.description1: We define digital presence not merely as having a website or app, but as building a properly architected system. By analyzing complex business processes, we develop high-performance, scalable, and operationally efficient software solutions.
whoWeAre.description2: Our expertise spans Enterprise ERP Systems, AI Automation, Full-stack Web, and Mobile Application development. We approach every project from an engineering perspective that prioritizes data security, code quality, and sustainability. Our goal is to guide businesses through their technological transformation, delivering 'Future-Proof' solutions that prepare them for tomorrow's digital requirements.

modular.title: 100% Modular Architecture
modular.desc: We build projects with fully documented code standards, easy maintenance, and compatibility for future growth and integrations.

performance.title: High-Performance Stack
performance.desc: With Next.js and Node.js infrastructure, we deliver optimized systems with millisecond-level response times meeting Core Web Vitals standards.

scalable.title: Scalable & Future-Proof
scalable.desc: We design autonomous business processes that minimize manual workload through AI integrations and cloud-native solutions.

pricing.title: Investment Plans
pricing.description: Flexible packages tailored to your needs

q1.question: How long does a project take?
q1.answer: It varies based on project complexity. Simple projects take 2-4 weeks, medium-scale projects 2-3 months, and large projects 3-6 months. I provide a clear timeline after the initial consultation.

q2.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
q2.answer: Yes, I provide 30 days of free post-launch support for all projects. Afterward, I offer monthly maintenance packages or on-demand support services.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: I work with bank transfers and wire transfers. Payment plan is 50% at project start and 50% at delivery. Milestone-based payment is also possible for large projects.

q4.question: Is source code delivered?
q4.answer: Yes, upon project completion, all source code, documentation, and necessary access credentials are delivered to you.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the project process work?
faq.a1: During our initial call, I analyze your requirements and prepare a detailed proposal. Once approved, we begin the development process using agile methodology.
faq.a2: Typically 50% upfront and 50% upon delivery. Monthly payment plans are available for larger projects.
faq.a3: Yes, I work completely remotely. I've successfully delivered projects for clients worldwide.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Eren Özden
privacy.description: Learn how your personal data is collected, used, and protected.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Eren Özden
terms.description: Terms and conditions that apply when using our website and services.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: This Privacy Policy explains how Eren Özden (mehmeterenozden.com) processes your personal data when you visit our website or contact us. By using this site, you agree to this policy.

sections.title: 2. Data We Collect
sections.content: We may collect information such as your name, email address, phone number, and message content through our contact form. We may also automatically collect cookies and analytics data (page views, browser type, device information) to improve site performance.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
sections.content: We use collected data solely to respond to your inquiries, provide services, improve the site experience, and fulfill legal obligations. Your data is never sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and administrative measures to protect your personal data. Contact forms are transmitted over secure connections (HTTPS). However, no data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, delete, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at mehmeteren850@gmail.com.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy, email us at mehmeteren850@gmail.com.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By accessing and using this website (mehmeterenozden.com), you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: This site is provided to showcase Eren Özden's software development services, display portfolio work, and facilitate communication with potential clients. Information on the site is for general reference and does not constitute a binding offer.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, design, code samples, images, and text on this site belong to Eren Özden and are protected by copyright law. They may not be copied, reproduced, or distributed without written permission.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: This site is provided "as is." No guarantee is made regarding the accuracy, timeliness, or completeness of content. We are not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from use of this site.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our site may contain links to GitHub, LinkedIn, and other external platforms. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

sections.title: 6. Changes
sections.content: We reserve the right to update these terms without prior notice. Changes take effect when published on this page.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at mehmeteren850@gmail.com.
